question: What are the basic definitions of ground effect?

options.text: The negative influence on the lifting characteristics of the vertical surfaces of an aircraft wing when it is close to the ground.
The positive influence on the lifting characteristics of the horizontal surfaces of an aircraft wing when it is further away from the ground.
The negative influence on the lifting characteristics of the horizontal surfaces of an aircraft wing when it is close to the ground.
The positive influence on the lifting characteristics of the horizontal surfaces of an aircraft wing when it is close to the ground.
